title: The replica that didn't exist
tagline: One checkout box at 85% CPU. The push notification fires at t=25s.

title: The rate limit that rejected the launch
tagline: Support is drowning in 429 screenshots while your checkout fleet naps at 13% CPU.

title: The herd that arrives every 20 seconds
tagline: Postgres throws 70% errors every 20 seconds, on the dot. Between spikes it's asleep.

title: The backlog that ate the broker
tagline: Your log-based queue's depth graph is a straight line going up. The pager is next.

title: The 9am digest that vanished
tagline: Every morning at 9:00 the push queue hits its cap for 15 seconds and silently drops 10,000 notifications.

title: Postgres is not your read cache
tagline: 1 800 product reads a second, every one hitting Postgres. The read side is shedding 40% of them.

title: Fifty connections against the flood
tagline: Reads doubled and 90% of queries are dying — the connection backlog is burying a 50-connection pool.

title: The shard your biggest customer melted
tagline: Three shards loaf at 15%. The fourth just OOM-killed Postgres. Your largest partner says hi.

title: Three retries to a dead payments service
tagline: The flash sale browned Payments out at 24% errors. Your retry policy burned it down.

title: The post that drowned delivery
tagline: Ingress peaked at 140 rps. Your delivery workers died at 5,600. Someone forgot the ×40.
